release_notes: v1.2.2 - Usability + update-safety. The results table now fills the full window width on wide screens (Candidate/Email/Phone get more room, score/recommendation columns stay compact, Gender/Nationality/Age stay readable) - no blank right-side area. Result filters add a 'Reset filters' button and a live 'Showing X of Y candidates' count; filters only change which rows are shown, never scores/ranking/recommendations/DEI. The DEI Summary window is now printable (Print/Copy/Close) with the 'monitoring only, not used for scoring' disclaimer; Excel/HTML DEI exports unchanged. Updater hardened so it never re-locks the program file during an update. If you see 'Error opening file for writing' while updating from an older version, close the app, wait a few seconds, and click Retry (not Ignore). History, reports, candidate database, and settings are preserved.
